svg.text: ▌ UNCLASSIFIED ▌ IRONFORGE MDMP SIMULATION — TRAINING AID ONLY ▌ NOT FOR OPERATIONAL USE ▌ UNCLASSIFIED ▌
▸ Restated mission produced — CDR intent developed
▸ COA-A: Defense in Depth — COA-B: Strongpoint
▸ Wargamed: 2 seq/COA vs MLCOA and MDCOA
▸ Branches and sequels identified for each COA
▸ 6 criteria — DEFENSE weights — B(3.87) C(3.71) A(3.42)
Concentrate combat power on key terrain with mutually supporting positions and integrated obstacle
belts. Main effort company team holds HILL 342 as decisive terrain with final protective fires.
Weighted score: 3.87/5.00 — Rank #1 of 3 — Risk: MODERATE (Accepted)
All outputs validated against Pydantic v2 schema — JSON artifacts available via API
5-paragraph OPORD produced per FM 6-0 Appendix C — 15 sub-paragraphs — Doctrine refs: FM 6-0 §C-1 to §C-7, FM 6-99 §3-1
Paragraphs: 1.Situation (3 sub) — 2.Mission (1) — 3.Execution (6 sub, incl. decisive op + 3 shaping) — 4.Sustainment (3) — 5.C&S (2)
